summary: Testing iteration 40: Three new SaaS features verified - Impersonation API (6 tests), Agent Name in tenants (1 test), Monitoring Alerts (5 tests), Data Isolation (1 test), RBAC (1 test). All 14 tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Impersonation endpoint correctly restricted to super_admin via get_super_admin dependency
Impersonation token correctly includes tenant_id in JWT claims enabling proper DB routing
Data isolation preserved: impersonated Tenant A cannot see Tenant B's data
agent_name field correctly populated from saas_agents collection lookup
Monitoring alerts correctly identify expired (critical) and expiring_soon (warning) subscriptions
Alerts properly sorted by severity (critical first, then warning, then info)
seed_data_creation: Test products created and cleaned up during isolation tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features verified: 1) Impersonation API at POST /api/saas/impersonate/{tenant_id} returns valid JWT that can access tenant products, 2) agent_name field present in GET /api/saas/tenants response, 3) Monitoring alerts at GET /api/saas/monitoring returns alerts for expired (critical) and expiring (warning) subscriptions. Current alerts: amir (expired, -3 days), farid (expiring, 2 days).

impersonation_api.notes: Returns valid JWT token, only accessible by super_admin, 404 for non-existent tenant

impersonation_data_isolation.notes: Impersonated token for Tenant A cannot access Tenant B's data

impersonation_token_products_access.notes: Token from impersonation can list products (status 200)

non_super_admin_blocked_from_impersonati.notes: Tenant users get 403 when calling impersonation endpoint

agent_name_in_tenants.notes: agent_name field present for all tenants, populated from saas_agents collection

monitoring_alerts.notes: Returns alerts array with correct structure, severity (critical/warning/info), and sorted by severity

expired_subscription_alert.notes: amir@amir has expired subscription (-3 days) with critical severity

expiring_subscription_alert.notes: farid@farid has expiring subscription (2 days) with warning severity

data_isolation.notes: Tenant A products not visible to Tenant B

rbac_super_admin_blocked.notes: Super Admin correctly gets 403 on tenant-specific routes
